x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Consolidates three existing APIs (Legistar, WordPress REST, Open Data SODA) behind one agent contract.

server.name: io.nyc.council
server.title: NYC Council
server.description: Agent-native access to the New York City Council — members, districts, committees, legislation, hearings, and discretionary funding. Consolidates the vendor Legistar API, the WordPress REST API, and NYC Open Data behind one owned surface; adds hearing testimony registration.
server.instructions: Use find_members / get_member (and get_member_legislation) for who represents whom and what they sponsor. find_legislation / get_legislation front the Legistar record of bills and local laws. find_meetings covers hearings (with video links). find_discretionary_funding answers 'what funding went to my district?'. register_testimony (net-new) requires an authenticated user and mutates state — confirm details with the user before submitting.

tools.name: find_members
tools.title: Find Council Members
tools.description: Search NYC Council members by borough, district, current status, and/or free text.

tools.name: get_member
tools.title: Get Council Member
tools.description: Fetch a council member (offices, committees, caucuses) by id.

tools.name: get_member_legislation
tools.title: Get Member's Legislation
tools.description: List the legislation a council member has sponsored.

tools.name: get_district
tools.title: Get District
tools.description: Get a council district (1-51) and its current member.

tools.name: find_committees
tools.title: Find Committees
tools.description: List NYC Council committees, subcommittees, and caucuses, optionally filtered by type.

tools.name: find_legislation
tools.title: Find Legislation
tools.description: Search bills, resolutions, and local laws by status, type, sponsor, committee, date range, or free text. Fronts the Legistar record.

tools.name: get_legislation
tools.title: Get Legislation
tools.description: Fetch a legislative matter by file number (e.g. 'Int 0123-2024').

tools.name: find_meetings
tools.title: Find Meetings & Hearings
tools.description: List Council meetings and committee hearings (with video/caption links) by body and/or date range. Fronts Legistar events.

tools.name: find_discretionary_funding
tools.title: Find Discretionary Funding
tools.description: Search discretionary funding and participatory budgeting awards by fiscal year, district, or member ('what funding went to my district?').

tools.name: register_testimony
tools.title: Register to Testify
tools.description: Register to testify (in-person, remote, or written) at a Council hearing. NET-NEW workflow with no equivalent today. Requires an authenticated user. Mutates state — confirm details with the user first.
